title: Minecraft Iron
description: Cohesive Difficulty and Progression Pack that tries to balance realism and the vanilla feel
body:
Minecraft Iron makes the game harder by adding features such as stamina, hydration, heat and cold, nutrition, as well as tool and material progression. You'll start with sticks and rocks, you'll need to craft the Crafting Rock for your first tools. There are now Copper and Steel tools, and reaching Iron tier will be more of a proccess. There is also post Iron upgrades and post Netherite tiers. 

Iron can only be obtained through Create Iron Sheets or by upgrading Copper gear with an Iron Smithing Template.

Food spoils, animals have to be butchered,  trees don't float, torches and campfires extinguish and go out, fire spreads kinda fast, mobs have solid hitboxes, zombies are scarier, when it's dark, it's DARK.


Difficulty and Progression mods include:

- Early Stage
- Progression Reborn
- TreeChop
- Dehydration
- Frostiful & Scorchful
- Burnt
- Butchery
- Nutrition
- Solid Mobs
- Hardcore Torches
- Realistic Campfires
- True Darkness

Key progression items

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. Rock, Flint and Sticks
2. Crafting Rock
3. Flint Tools
4. Wood
5. Crafting Table
6. Wood Tools
7. Stone
8. Furnace
9. Stone Tools
13. Copper Tools
10. Sieve
11. Steel
12. Steel Tools

An Iron pickaxe can then be obtained through upgrading a Copper Pickaxe in a Smithing Table with an Iron Smithing Template or by using the Mechanical Press to create Iron Plates

</details>

Optional Mods:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
-   body health system
-   fireplace mode
-   jobsaddon
-   LevelZ
-   physics mod
-   Realistic Inventory

</details>
